task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration page for DID '8885559999'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the admin interface with the inbound DID '8885559999' selected or its specific configuration page open.

task_completion.description: Configure the DID to route to the 'SUPPORT' In-Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A routing field, such as 'DID Route' or 'In-Group', set to 'SUPPORT' or showing 'SUPPORT' selected in the routing destination.

task_completion.description: Set the Call Time for the DID to '9am-5pm'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Call Time' dropdown or input field explicitly set to '9am-5pm'.

task_completion.description: Set the after-hours or filter action to route to Voicemail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'After Hours Action', 'Filter Action', or similar routing field set to 'VOICEMAIL'.

task_completion.description: Set the after-hours Voicemail box to '8500'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Voicemail Box', 'Extension', or similar field associated with the after-hours/voicemail action set to '8500'.
A checkbox, radio button, or dropdown for 'Clean CID Number' set to 'Y', 'Yes', or visibly checked.

integrity.description: The agent used the web-based graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the application's admin panel, not a terminal running SQL commands or curl requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the actual application (e.g., Vicidial admin), not a text editor or a static HTML mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel is open showing DOM manipulation of the form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target DID to configure is '8885559999'. Required Call Time is '9am-5pm'. Expected after-hours action is 'VOICEMAIL' with the voicemail box extension '8500'.
